description: Search and retrieval — semantic search, embeddings, and information retrieval for AI systems

concepts.label: Semantic Search
concepts.description: Retrieval method that matches queries by meaning rather than exact keywords, using vector embeddings to find conceptually related content

concepts.label: Vector Embedding
concepts.description: Dense numeric representation of text, images, or other data in high-dimensional space where semantic similarity corresponds to geometric proximity

concepts.label: Information Retrieval
concepts.description: Process of finding relevant documents, passages, or facts from a corpus in response to a query
